checklist.description: The script correctly identifies entry idx=5 (when=1748100000000) as having a `when` value smaller than the previous entry (when=1774560400004)
checklist.name: Detects non-monotonic entry

checklist.description: The patched `when` for idx=5 is set to a value strictly greater than 1774560400004 (e.g. 1774560400005 or higher)
checklist.name: Patches to monotonic value

checklist.description: All other fields of patched entries (idx, version, tag, breakpoints) remain unchanged — only the `when` field is modified
checklist.name: Preserves other fields

checklist.description: A `fixed_journal.json` file is produced containing the corrected journal with valid JSON
checklist.name: Outputs fixed_journal.json

checklist.description: In `fixed_journal.json`, the `when` value for the last entry (idx=5) is strictly greater than 1774560400004
checklist.name: Correct fixed when value

checklist.description: All `when` values in `fixed_journal.json` are in strictly increasing order
checklist.name: Monotonic ordering in output

checklist.description: The script prints or logs which entries were patched and what the old and new `when` values are
checklist.name: Report of changes

checklist.description: The script is written to handle more than one out-of-order entry (not hard-coded for just idx=5), evidenced by a loop or general check over all entries
checklist.name: Handles multiple bad entries

context: Tests whether the agent understands the drizzle-kit journal timestamp problem specific to repos using synthetic future-dated `when` values, and correctly implements a tool that detects non-monotonic entries and patches them to the next valid monotonic value.
